rationale: Series-coherence/gate-forwardness lens, all points verified against the tree and the 109/110 worktrees. (a) Prereq gate is correctly worded: Open Question #8 gates plan-approve on BOTH 109+110 MERGED-to-main AND rebase-forward before plan approve (line 133); Background+Impacted-Domains restate it. (b) ADRs 0037/0035/0036/0034 are all Accepted and workflow-intersecting; the spec's parenthetical Domain lines match each ADR file exactly. ADR-0040 correctly prose-only (no file on this branch), consistent with 110's pinned extraction rule and the ../../adr/ link convention (identical in merged spec 107, so 110-R6 validates the ADR number, not the literal link path). (c) R9 encodes the .claude/workflows/** same-diff-or-earlier claim citing the exact spec-108 invariant, backed by an AC grep + a validate test. (d) Clean 4-bead cut (claim+validate-test+doc / workflow-file+doc / embed+setup+tests+doc / skills-branch+doc), each one commit + one workflow-doc append; nothing unimplementable — embed/setup mirror proven SkillFiles/installSkills. (e) Capability tiers stated: codex/copilot installs stay skills-path (R8), host-without-workflow degrades to skills (R6). (f) No file conflict: 109/110 touch neither OWNERSHIP.yaml nor embed.go nor setup/claude.go; the only shared surfaces (two skills, internal/validate) are sequenced by the merged+rebase-forward gate.

findings.note: The AC `! grep -q 'mindspec complete' "$W"` (line 104, restated in Validation Proofs) is a literal-string exclusion over the whole workflow file — a well-meaning comment such as `// this workflow never runs `mindspec complete`` inside ms-panel.js would trip the workflow's own gate. Non-blocking; worth a one-line note to the plan/impl bead so the workflow author avoids the literal string in comments. Does not affect approvability.

verified: isDocFile(.claude/workflows/ms-panel.js)=false and isProcessArtifact=false in internal/validate (divergence.go:300, docsync.go:393) — R9's 'governable source, verified' claim is grounded.

TestWorkflowOwnsTraceAndGolangci exists (internal/validate/ownership_wave2_test.go) — the 108 precedent R9 cites is real; attributeDomain matches path-string vs globs (no stat), so Bead-1 claim+test passes before the workflow file exists.
SkillFiles()+//go:embed (plugins/mindspec/embed.go), installSkills (internal/setup/claude.go:159) exist to mirror for WorkflowFiles()+workflow install.
Spec 109 scope: internal/config + internal/panel + cmd + .mindspec/adr — does NOT touch workflow OWNERSHIP.yaml, embed.go, or setup/claude.go.

Spec 110 scope: internal/panel + cmd + internal/approve + internal/validate/spec.go + internal/instruct + the two skills (shrink) — does NOT touch OWNERSHIP.yaml, embed.go, or setup/claude.go. Only shared surfaces with 111 (skills, validate) are sequenced by the 110-merged+rebase-forward gate.

ADR-0037 Accepted/workflow,execution; 0035 Accepted/workflow,execution,core; 0036 Accepted/workflow,validation,doc-sync,ownership; 0034 Accepted/workflow — all match the spec's parenthetical Domain lines.
